Scripts.OnShow: local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") self:SetFrameLevel(self:GetParent():GetFrameLevel() + 3) self:SetText(AL["Toggle AL Panel"]) self:SetWidth(self:GetTextWidth() + 20) AtlasLootInfo_Text2:SetText(AL["Click boss name to view loot."])
Scripts.OnClick: if AtlasLoot.db.profile.HidePanel then AtlasLoot.db.profile.HidePanel = false if AtlasFrame and AtlasFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasLootPanel:Show() end else AtlasLoot.db.profile.HidePanel = true if AtlasFrame and AtlasFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasLootPanel:Hide() end end AtlasLootOptionsFrameHidePanel:SetChecked(AtlasLoot.db.profile.HidePanel) AtlasLoot_SetupForAtlas()

Scripts.OnEnter: local BabbleEpoch = AtlasLoot_GetLocaleLibBabble("LibBabble-Epoch-3.0") GameTooltip:ClearLines() GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, "ANCHOR_RIGHT") GameTooltip:AddLine("|cffff0000"..BabbleEpoch["Filter Items"]) GameTooltip:AddLine(BabbleEpoch["Hides any items on this page\nwhich are excluded by your\nfilter options."]) GameTooltip:AddLine("|cff4488FF"..BabbleEpoch["Right click"]..": ".."|cffFFD100"..BabbleEpoch["Open filter options."]) GameTooltip:Show()

Scripts.OnLoad: local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") _G[self:GetName().."Text"]:SetText(AL["Show itemIDs at all times"])
local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") _G[self:GetName().."Text"]:SetText(AL["Load Loot Modules at Startup"])

Scripts.OnClick: if AtlasLoot.db.profile.EquipCompare then AtlasLoot.db.profile.EquipCompare = false if EquipCompare_UnregisterTooltip then EquipCompare_UnregisterTooltip(AtlasLootTooltip) end else AtlasLoot.db.profile.EquipCompare = true if EquipCompare_RegisterTooltip then EquipCompare_RegisterTooltip(AtlasLootTooltip) end end

if AtlasLoot.db.profile.HidePanel then AtlasLoot.db.profile.HidePanel = false if AtlasFrame then if AtlasFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasLootPanel:Show() end end else AtlasLoot.db.profile.HidePanel = true if AtlasFrame then if AtlasFrame:IsVisible() then AtlasLootPanel:Hide() end end end

Scripts.OnLoad: local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") AtlasLootOptionsFrame_FuBarNotice:SetText(AL["The Minimap Button is generated by the FuBar Plugin."].."\n"..AL["This is automatic, you do not need FuBar installed."])

Scripts.OnEnter: if self:IsEnabled() then GameTooltip:ClearLines() GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, "ANCHOR_RIGHT") GameTooltip:AddLine(AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][1][3]) GameTooltip:Show() end
Scripts.OnShow: local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") self:SetText(AL["QuickLook"].." 1") self:SetFrameLevel(self:GetParent():GetFrameLevel() + 3) if not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][1] or not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][1][1] then self:Disable() end

Scripts.OnEnter: if self:IsEnabled() then GameTooltip:ClearLines() GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, "ANCHOR_RIGHT") GameTooltip:AddLine(AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][2][3]) GameTooltip:Show() end
Scripts.OnShow: local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") self:SetText(AL["QuickLook"].." 2") self:SetFrameLevel(self:GetParent():GetFrameLevel() + 3) if not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][2] or not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][2][1] then self:Disable() end

Scripts.OnEnter: if self:IsEnabled() then GameTooltip:ClearLines() GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, "ANCHOR_RIGHT") GameTooltip:AddLine(AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][3][3]) GameTooltip:Show() end
Scripts.OnShow: local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") self:SetText(AL["QuickLook"].." 3") self:SetFrameLevel(self:GetParent():GetFrameLevel() + 3) if not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][3] or not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][3][1] then self:Disable() end

Scripts.OnEnter: if self:IsEnabled() then GameTooltip:ClearLines() GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, "ANCHOR_RIGHT") GameTooltip:AddLine(AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][4][3]) GameTooltip:Show() end
Scripts.OnShow: local AL = LibStub("AceLocale-3.0"):GetLocale("AtlasLoot") self:SetText(AL["QuickLook"].." 4") self:SetFrameLevel(self:GetParent():GetFrameLevel() + 3) if not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][4] or not AtlasLootCharDB["QuickLooks"][4][1] then self:Disable() end
